message:
deps: bump proptest 1.6.0 -> 1.11.0

Minor bumps within 1.x. New Strategy combinators and perf work on
shrinking; existing `prop_compose!` / `proptest!` call sites unchanged.

Verification: rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -60,7 +60,7 @@ insta = "1.47.2"
 libc = "0.2.185"
 memchr = "2.8.0"
 parking_lot = "0.12.5"
-proptest = "1.6.0"
+proptest = "1.11.0"
 rayon = "1.11.0"
 serde = { version = "1.0.218", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = { version = "1.0.140", features = ["preserve_order"] }
